integrity_precision.note: strict_integrity_precision is a conservative lower bound that records every surface-form deviation as a modification; semantic_integrity_precision relaxes the test to information equivalence (e.g. date vs midnight-datetime serialisation). format_only_modifications = semantic_preserved - strict_preserved isolates representational reformatting from genuine information loss.
